title: taraxacum teuvaense
intro: Taraxacum teuvaense, also known as the Teuva dandelion, is a plant species within the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum teuvaense include its potential to support liver and kidney function, lower blood pressure, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. Taraxacum teuvaense can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, making it a versatile ingredient in various traditional remedies.
